3136160.name: False Ages I - Dark Lords of Hermad
3136160.description:
False Ages I - Dark Lords of Hermad

🌑 A Retro Dark Fantasy Where Light Is a Lie 🌑

Step into the cursed world of False Ages I - Dark Lords of Hermad, a brooding turn-based RPG forged in the shadow of old gods and broken worlds. Drawn from the rich world of my original False Ages pen & paper RPG, this is a story of dark myths, deep lore, and doomed heroes—now realized as a retro RPG.

⚔️ What Awaits You:

  • Retro 816 x 624 Graphics
    Experience dark fantasy through a pixelated lens—nostalgic, haunting, and beautifully oppressive.

  • A Tale of Shadows and Ruin
    Walk the cursed path of heroes and traitors alike in a world where truth is twisted and legends bleed.

  • Tactical Turn-Based Combat
    Master every move. Every decision matters. Strategy reigns in a land where mercy has long been forgotten.

  • Deadly Challenges
    Face vicious creatures, cryptic puzzles, and punishing quests that test more than just your blade.

  • Secrets Buried in Dust
    Scour the land for lost knowledge, forbidden relics, and hidden horrors the world was meant to forget.

  • An Immersive, Dread-Soaked Soundtrack
    Let the music pull you deeper into despair—or give you strength to carry on.

🛠️ Crafted with RPG Maker MZ

Built using modern tools to capture the spirit of the past, False Ages merges classic design with an original world drawn from my own pen-and-paper RPG saga.

💀 Join the March into Darkness:

📌 Follow for updates, lore reveals, and upcoming content.
🗨️ Share your thoughts in the community—secrets favor those who speak.

⚔️ About False Ages:

False Ages is more than a game—it's a chronicle of a pen & paper RPG world crafted by me and brought to life around the table with friends. Every pixel echoes tales of betrayal, ancient power, and doomed rebellion. Enter if you dare… but know this: few who venture into the City of Hermad ever return the same.
